cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out which statement is NOT an advantage of the algorithm described in the passage. Let me read through the text again and then go through each option carefully. The passage says that the monitor "watches" deceleration and distance from a light and "guesses" which cars are likely to break the Highway Code. It provides a two-second warning if someone is about to cross a crossroads, helping other drivers brake. Jonathan How from MIT mentions that future "smart" cars might use this system to help drivers avoid accidents. The algorithm was tested in Virginia and accurately identified potential violators within a couple of seconds. It brings fewer false alarms, which is important for systems guiding human drivers.
